en: He is a cat with a Bazooka. What more do you want?
Oh wow look at this guy. They wanna change the settings? What a loser.
Oh what? Are the default settings too good for you?
Can you not read? It’s a prototype.
Bazookat would be disappointed in you.
There is no audio. What do you even want to change?
I hope it was worth it kid.
Are you sure you want to quit?
